reviews.comment:
Llegué para ir al baño, y con la intención de comprar un paquete de yerba , debido a que me quedé sin... Cuando entré y pregunté cuánto valía, un paquete de medio kilo me lo quisieron cobrar $115 , si, ciento quince pesos... No compré, y me dirigí al frente, del otro lado de la ruta, hay una despensa, en la cual el mismo paquete, la misma marca, de medio kilo, $55 .....

(Translated by Google)
I arrived to use the restroom, intending to buy a package of yerba mate, since I ran out... When I went in and asked how much it cost, they wanted to charge me $115 for a half-kilo package, yes, one hundred and fifteen pesos... I didn't buy it, and I went across the road to a small store where the same package, the same brand, half a kilo, was $55...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZNTRyTnd3RRAB
